# t21.4 - Explicit Runtime Proof for Remaining Docs, Alternate, Primitive, and Image Surfaces

## Summary

Collected explicit runtime proof on the authoritative packaged Spring Boot 3 WAR against the repo-local DB2 primary lane on `http://127.0.0.1:19101/daytrader`.

The remaining surface families do not close cleanly. The seeded DB2 lane still preserves the directly reachable XHTML/JSF alternate pages, but the final inventory-complete sweep found three real parity gaps:

- Two documentation links exposed by `docs/documentation.html` are broken at runtime: `docs/tradeTech.pdf` and `docs/tradeUML.pdf` both return `404`.
- The primitive launcher inventory is still substantially incomplete on the packaged Boot runtime: only `13/43` primitive destinations answered successfully; the other `30` linked servlet/EJB-style primitive routes returned `404`.
- Switching the runtime to `JSP-Images` preserves most image-mode action surfaces, but `app?action=home` fails with `500` because `tradehomeImg.jsp` includes `marketSummary.jsp`, which triggers `IllegalStateException` through `ResourceHttpMessageConverter` while the JSP include pipeline is active.

integration: FAIL — explicit seeded-DB2 surface proof found broken docs links, 30 missing primitive routes, and one image-mode controller failure.
e2e: PARTIAL — alternate XHTML/JSF pages and most image-mode surfaces render on the live lane, but the full remaining surface inventory does not preserve parity.
overall: FAIL — PM sign-off cannot close because the final docs/primitive/image proof slice still contains concrete runtime failures.

## Environment

- JDK: Microsoft OpenJDK 17 (`%USERPROFILE%\scoop\apps\microsoft17-jdk\current`)
- Docker daemon: available (`29.4.3`)
- Node.js: available (`v22.17.1`)
- DB lane: `pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -File .\scripts\start-db2-primary-lane.ps1 -ResetData`
- Runtime: `. .\target\daytrader-db2-app-env.ps1; java -jar target\io.openliberty.sample.daytrader8.war --server.port=19101`
- Probe script: `.github\modernize\rearchitecture\artifacts\checkpoints\t21.4-runtime-proof.ps1`

## Surface Verdicts

- Seeded DB2 lane availability: PASS
  - `uid:0 / xxx` login succeeded on the live lane.
  - Anonymous `config?action=buildDB` returned `401`, which is acceptable on this already-seeded lane and matches the preserved post-seed guard behavior.
- Alternate JSF/XHTML reachability: PASS
  - Public routes passed: `index.faces`, `welcome.faces`, `register.faces`, `configure.faces`, `web_prmtv.faces`, `docs/tradeFAQ.faces`, `PingJsf.faces`, `PingCDIJSF.faces`.
  - Authenticated routes passed: `tradehome.faces`, `account.faces`, `marketSummary.faces`, `portfolio.faces`, `quote.faces`.
- Documentation inventory: FAIL
  - Passed: `docs/tradeFAQ.html`, `docs/tradeversion.html`, `docs/benchmarking.html`, `docs/documentation.html`, `docs/glossary.html`, `docs/rtCharacterisitics.html`.
  - Failed: `docs/tradeTech.pdf` and `docs/tradeUML.pdf` returned `404`.
- Primitive launcher inventory: FAIL
  - Passed: `13/43` routes, including the launcher `web_prmtv.html`, static/WebSocket primitive pages, and the smaller surviving primitive subset.
  - Failed: `30/43` routes, all returning `404` on the live Boot runtime.
- Image surfaces: FAIL
  - Direct public pages passed: `welcomeImg.jsp`, `registerImg.jsp`.
  - Runtime config update to `WebInterface=1` passed with `200 OK`.
  - Authenticated image-mode action surfaces passed: `app?action=account`, `app?action=portfolio`, `app?action=quotes&symbols=s:0,s:1`, `app?action=buy&symbol=s:0&quantity=1`.
  - Authenticated image-mode home failed: `app?action=home` returned `500`.

## Failing Runtime Inventory

### Documentation

- `GET /daytrader/docs/tradeTech.pdf` -> `404 Not Found`
- `GET /daytrader/docs/tradeUML.pdf` -> `404 Not Found`

### Primitive routes returning `404`

- `/daytrader/servlet/ExplicitGC`
- `/daytrader/servlet/PingServletCDI`
- `/daytrader/servlet/PingServletCDIBeanManagerViaJNDI`
- `/daytrader/servlet/PingServletCDIBeanManagerViaCDICurrent`
- `/daytrader/servlet/PingServlet2Include`
- `/daytrader/servlet/PingServlet2Servlet`
- `/daytrader/servlet/PingServlet2PDF`
- `/daytrader/servlet/PingServlet2DB`
- `/daytrader/servlet/PingSession1`
- `/daytrader/servlet/PingSession2`
- `/daytrader/servlet/PingSession3`
- `/daytrader/servlet/PingJDBCRead`
- `/daytrader/servlet/PingJDBCRead2JSP`
- `/daytrader/servlet/PingJDBCWrite`
- `/daytrader/servlet/PingServlet2JNDI`
- `/daytrader/servlet/PingUpgradeServlet`
- `/daytrader/servlet/PingManagedThread`
- `/daytrader/servlet/PingManagedExecutor`
- `/daytrader/servlet/PingJSONP`
- `/daytrader/ejb3/PingServlet2Session`
- `/daytrader/ejb3/PingServlet2SessionLocal`
- `/daytrader/ejb3/PingServlet2Entity`
- `/daytrader/ejb3/PingServlet2Session2Entity`
- `/daytrader/ejb3/PingServlet2Session2Entity2JSP`
- `/daytrader/ejb3/PingServlet2Session2EntityCollection`
- `/daytrader/ejb3/PingServlet2Session2CMROne2One`
- `/daytrader/ejb3/PingServlet2Session2CMROne2Many`
- `/daytrader/ejb3/PingServlet2MDBQueue`
- `/daytrader/ejb3/PingServlet2MDBTopic`
- `/daytrader/ejb3/PingServlet2TwoPhase`

### Image-mode `500`

- `GET /daytrader/app?action=home` under `WebInterface=1` -> `500 Internal Server Error`
- Server trace: `tradehomeImg.jsp` includes `marketSummary.jsp`, and the request fails with `java.lang.IllegalStateException` from `ServletResponseWrapperInclude.getOutputStream(...)` via Spring's `ResourceHttpMessageConverter` during the nested include path.

## Findings

- CRITICAL: The primitive launcher family is not preserved as an inventory-complete runtime surface on the packaged Boot app. Most linked servlet/EJB primitive destinations are missing entirely (`404`).
- HIGH: Two documentation assets linked from `docs/documentation.html` are missing at runtime (`tradeTech.pdf`, `tradeUML.pdf`).
- HIGH: `JSP-Images` mode is still unstable for the authenticated home route. The image-mode home page fails with `500` even though the other image-mode action surfaces render.
